mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HRTATTREQAPPR01 (REQUEST_ID, SEQ, COMPANY, APPROVER_CODE, APPROVAL_STATUS, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{requestId}, #{seq}, #{company}, #{approverCode}, #{approvalStatus}, GETDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT a.REQUEST_ID AS requestId, a.SEQ AS seq, a.COMPANY AS company, a.APPROVER_CODE AS approverCode, h.EMP_NAME AS approverName, a.APPROVAL_STATUS AS approvalStatus, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), a.APPROVED_AT, 120) AS approvedAt FROM HRTATTREQAPPR01 a LEFT JOIN HRIMASTER01 h ON a.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND a.APPROVER_CODE = h.EMP_CODE WHERE a.REQUEST_ID = #{requestId} ORDER BY a.SEQ
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HRTATTREQAPPR01 WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId} AND APPROVAL_STATUS = 'APPROVED'
